_note: Patterns (plan §8). areaGenerated, levelUp, zoneEntered and izaro are VERIFIED verbatim against real captures (fixtures/act1-real.log 2026-07-17; an Izaro trial line 2026-07-21). The 'chat' sigil filter remains assumption-based — chat lines are stripped from committed fixtures, so revisit it if a real chat line ever gets through. Regexes use named groups; only the distinctive substring is matched, so the timestamp/log-tag prefix is ignored. The tracker drops chat lines BEFORE parsing (privacy §11.1 + prevents a whisper from spoofing a level-up or zone). izaro captures Izaro's NPC voice line (no channel sigil, so it isn't dropped as chat); each trial has a distinct plaque line, so the trials engine maps the captured line to the exact trial it completes.
